meaning: adj.市政的,市立的,地方性的,地方自治的
examples: The municipal authorities gave the go-ahead for the march.
The municipal authorities here are preparing for food rationing.
Islanders have campaigned for the abolition of one of the three tiers of municipal power on the island.
Unlike TIPS, which are taxable, the municipal bond version offers a real aftertax return.
All U.S., federal, state and local and Canadian federal, provincial, and municipal laws and regulations apply.
